channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Jan. 6 rioter pardoned by Trump was convicted of sexually abusing children
item.description: A handyman from Florida who received a pardon from President Trump for storming the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, was convicted on state charges of ch...

item.title: Greetings from Mexico City's iconic boulevard, where a dog on a bike steals the show
item.description: Every week, more than 100,000 people ride bikes, skates and rollerblades past some of the best-known parts of Mexico's capital. And sometimes their do...

item.title: U.S. unexpectedly adds 130,000 jobs in January after a weak 2025
item.description: U.S. employers added 130,000 jobs in January as the unemployment rate dipped to 4.3% from 4.4% in December. Annual revisions show that job growth last...

item.title: Person detained in Nancy Guthrie case is released. And, Bondi testifies before House
item.description: Police have released a person taken in for questioning in connection with Nancy Guthrie's disappearance. And, AG Pam Bondi will testify before the Hou...

item.title: What are the latest developments in the Jeffrey Epstein case?
item.description: Journalist Vicky Ward first profiled sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in 2003. She discusses the fallout from the millions of publicly released documents,...

item.title: Breezy Johnson has plans for her repaired gold medal
item.description: Team USA star skier Breezy Johnson talks with CBS News about her broken Olympic medal, a superstition, and what keeps her motivated on the slopes.

item.title: Pentagon-FAA dispute over lasers to thwart cartel drones led to airspace closure, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

item.title: Bondi: DOJ "will of course unredact" mens' names in Epstein files that "should not have been" hidden
item.description: At a House hearing on Wednesday, Democratic Rep. Lou Correa of California criticized some of the redactions in the Justice Department's files on convi...

item.title: Police release man detained in connection to Nancy Guthrie disappearance
item.description: Police had searched the home of the person, who was taken into custody at a traffic stop.

item.title: Powerful cyclone kills at least 31 as it tears through Madagascar port
item.description: Madagascar's disaster management says roads are inaccessible with trees uprooted, power poles down and ninety percent of roofs ripped off.

item.title: 'It was terrifying': Tumbler Ridge's tight-knit community in shock after shooting
item.description: Members of the remote community have spoken of their fear and uncertainty after nine people were killed.

item.title: FBI combs through thick desert terrain in search for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Trump says he "insisted that negotiations with Iran continue" during meeting with Netanyahu
item.description: President Trump met with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu at the White House Wednesday as U.S. officials hold indirect talks with Iran over i...

item.title: Dispute over Cardi B's Super Bowl cameo roils prediction markets
item.description: Cardi B appeared during Bad Bunny's halftime show at the Super Bowl, but one prediction market says it's unclear whether she sang.

item.title: Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigations
Trump tells Netanyahu Iran nuclear talks must continue
item.description: The US President said "nothing definitive" was agreed during the meeting between the two leaders at the White House on Wednesday as nuclear talks inte...

item.title: US reopens airspace over Texas border town after 'cartel drone incursion'
item.description: The FAA had closed the airspace around El Paso for more than a week citing security measures, but then quickly said flights could resume.

item.title: A new tax break on auto loan interest may help 4 million car owners
item.description: New deduction allows taxpayers to deduct up to $10,000 on interest they paid to buy a new American-made vehicle in 2025.
